title: Long Hoodie Blanket for Women and Men, Wearable Blanket with Sleeves and Giant Pockets, Thick Flannel Sherpa Fleecea hoodie,Super Soft Warm Cozy Oversized Winter Robe
features: Premium Materials for Ultimate Comfort：Crafted with a soft flannel exterior and a plush Sherpa fleece lining, this hooded blanket delivers luxurious warmth and an ultra-soft feel. It is designed to be anti-pilling, fade-resistant, odour-free—perfect for daily relaxation in chilly seasons.

Oversized Design for Everyone：With a generous 150 cm length and loose-fitting shape, this wearable hoodie blanket offers full-body coverage and fits most adults comfortably. It’s ideal for lounging, reading, or relaxing on the sofa, providing all-around coziness for men and women alike.

Functional and Practical Details: Featuring a warm, roomy hood and two large side pockets, this design keeps your head and hands toasty while providing convenient space to store your phone, snacks, or remote—functional comfort wherever you are.

Machine Washable & Easy to Care For：This blanket is machine washable in cold water, can be tumble dried on low, and requires no ironing or dry cleaning—making it simple and hassle-free to keep fresh and clean. Note: The product is vacuum-packed for delivery. Slight wrinkles may appear upon opening—please wash before first use for best results.

Perfect Gift for Any Occasion：Available in multiple stylish colours, this oversized hoodie blanket makes a thoughtful gift for Valentine's Day, birthdays, Thanksgiving, Christmas, New Year, or any special occasion. Give the gift of comfort to yourself or someone you love.
